templates.name: Can I pause or skip a month during my membership? Will I retain my benefits if I do? Can I skip for more than one month at a time?
templates.content: When you select to skip your membership, all of your benefits are paused for one month, including the 2% monthly bonus awarded on top of your total R+ Credit. All monthly, yearly or additional contributions are 100% converted to R+ Credit and are eligible for the 2% monthly bonus for the 12 months following that contribution as long as you remain active. If you skip for one month, you lose that bonus, and now you will at most be awarded the 2% monthly bonus 11 times. The more months you skip, the fewer times you will be awarded the 2% monthly bonus. If you never skip a month, your total Rebag+ credit will get an aggregated bonus of up to 27% after 12 months.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://support.rebag.com/hc/en-us/articles/360037853551-What-is-Rebag-s-Return-Policy

templates.name: Will I be notified before I get charged?
templates.content: For monthly memberships, Rebag will not notify you in advance of charging your contribution, but you will receive a confirmation email each time you are charged. For yearly memberships, Rebag will provide a notification one month before renewal.

templates.name: Can I Trade my Infinity Quote?
templates.content: Yes! If you already have an infinity offer you may complete a Trade directly from the Existing Offers page. If you don't have an offer yet be sure to submit your Rebag purchased item from your purchase history to get an infinity quote and then start a trade from your existing offers page.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: While customers can use any existing points balance towards a future purchase, Rebag Rewards is no longer offered. All customers will still earn 1 point for every $2 transacted and can visit your Wallet for a summary of your points activity. Benefits like VIP Preview of new arrivals and Early Access to sale are now included in the Rebag+ membership.

templates.name: My monthly contribution charge failed, what can I do?
templates.content: If we are unable to charge your monthly contribution, we will notify you by email and give you five days before we try again. During those five days, your membership benefits will remain active. Update your payment method and ensure that the credit card used for your membership contribution has enough funds. If the payment fails again when we retry 5 days later, we will cancel your membership.

templates.name: Do I have to sell my items if I don’t like my offer?
templates.content: If you are not satisfied with your offer, or if you decide you no longer wish to sell, there is no obligation to accept our offer. You may decline your quote through your account.

templates.name: How can I get paid in store?
templates.content:
Good question. Rebag offers three methods of payment: 
- Rebag Credit 
- ACH electronic transfer (similar to direct deposit) 
- Check (mailed) 
All payment details are saved in a secured payment system.

templates.name: How can I make additional contributions? What are the possible amounts?
templates.content: Active Rebag+ members can make additional contributions at any time by going to My Account → Wallet → Rebag+ → Manage Membership, and selecting Additional Contribution. You can select one of our default amounts or enter the custom amount (up to $100,000) and proceed with a standard checkout.

templates.name: What payment method can I use to pay for my membership? Can I use Rebag Credit or a Discount Code?
templates.content: Rebag+ monthly and yearly contributions can only be paid for using valid debit or credit cards. We will work on enabling other payment methods for our members' ease of use in the future. The membership contribution will never be discounted or payable with existing Rebag Credit.

templates.name: Where can I see the details of my Trade order?
templates.content: All the details of your Trade order are available at My Account > Trades.

templates.name: How do I cash out?
templates.content: Simply click 'Cash Out' in your Wallet. You will be asked to select a payment method - either bank transfer (formally ACH) or check - and will be prompted to enter your bank account information or address.

templates.name: What is a Trade — how does it work?
templates.content: With Trade, you can buy and sell items in one transaction, and only pay for the difference. Once you have placed your order, you need to promptly ship the items that you are selling to Rebag, or drop them off at a Rebag Store. We will process them and if everything looks good, we'll send your new purchase to you.

templates.name: How long does it take for my check to be delivered?
templates.content: After cashing out your Seller Funds via check, checks take 7-10 business days for delivery by mail. Checks are mailed by a 3rd party. They will be delivered regular USPS in 7-10 business days. Please note checks do not have tracking numbers

templates.name: What is the advantage of doing consignment vs. other options?
templates.content: Consigning your item gives you the opportunity to potentially maximize your payouts. Consignors will be offered very attractive commission rates and allow Rebag to aim for the highest payouts during the consignment window.

templates.name: Will my Seller Funds expire?
templates.content: No, there's no expiration date on your Seller Funds.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Can I cancel my trade-in order after I have shipped the items to you? I no longer want to sell/purchase.
templates.content: You can request to cancel a Trade order up until it's finalized, which takes about 24 hours once your traded items are received by Rebag. After that, your traded-in items are owned by Rebag and you can only get a refund for the item that you purchased as a combination of cash refund (for the amount you paid out of pocket) and Rebag Credit for the value of your items traded-in. If you cancel before the Trade order is finalized, you will be refunded and your items will be sent back to you.

templates.name: Can I use a discount code at checkout on top of my Rebag+ reduced price for an item I would like to purchase?
templates.content: Yes! Rebag+ members can use discount codes at checkout on top of up to 10% off member pricing on all items.

templates.name: How long do bank transfers take?
templates.content: After cashing out your Seller Funds via ACH electronic bank transfer, payment takes 1 full business day to reflect in your account. Please note if you elect to cash out over the weekend, payment will not reflect until the next business day.

templates.name: When will my Special Day discount code be issued?
templates.content: Rebag+ members will receive their Special Day discount code after three active months of membership. Special Day discount codes will be emailed and available in My Account → Wallet → Rebag+.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at contact@rebag.com or give us a call at 1-844-373-7723 . Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How can I file a claim?
templates.content:
To file a claim on hiclyde.com, you have two options.
Either by logging in to your account and selecting the corresponding product or as a guest using the contract ID found on your welcome email.

templates.name: What is Clyde?
templates.content: Rebag has partnered with Clyde for you to easily purchase a protection plan for select products on our website. Clyde will directly handle your claims in a few simple steps!

templates.name: How do I see increased seller offers as a Rebag+ member?
templates.content: We automatically apply our increased offers to all Rebag+ members by default. If you are a Rebag+ member logged into your account and going through the Sell Now flow, you will see offers with buyout prices and consignment payouts that are up to 5% higher than a non-member would receive  for the same item.

templates.name: How do I request a refund of my contribution?
templates.content: 100% of membership contributions are converted to R+ Credit. If that credit is not used toward a purchase, it can be refunded at any time. Simply go to My Account → Wallet → Rebag+ → Manage Membership, and select Request a Refund.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-844-373-7723 on Monday to Friday from 11 AM EST until 4 PM EST, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: I am asked to pay an additional amount to finalize my Trade — why is that?
templates.content: When Rebag evaluates the items that you've traded in, if the outcome is a rejection or a lower value than expected, you may be required to pay a Trade adjustment fee in order to finalize your Trade order and receive the new items that you've purchased. The Trade adjustment fee covers the difference between the expected value of your item that you used to checkout initially and the actual value of the item once reviewed by Rebag, plus tax if applicable.

templates.name: Where can I see details on my current membership plan? Is there a place to view all of my Rebag+ activity?
templates.content: To find details about your current membership, as well as your past activity. Log in and go to My Account → Wallet → Rebag+.

templates.name: Can I sell Internationally?
templates.content: Rebag can only purchase items within the United States of America. We require a US address.

templates.name: How do I get my 10% Spending Bonus?
templates.content: Any time you put the Seller Funds in your Wallet towards a Rebag Purchase, the 10% Spending Bonus will be automatically applied.

templates.name: Can I change my monthly contribution to a yearly one?
templates.content: This is currently not available, but it is coming soon!

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Size may vary between brands. Please check the size guide on the product page.

templates.name: I’ve changed my mind. What if I want my item back?
templates.content: Once you have agreed to our offers and we received your items, we are unable to send your items back to you. We only proceed with your order once you have agreed to our offers. Please refer to our Terms of Service here https://www.rebag.com/terms/

templates.name: When do I receive my Seller Funds from my Cash Offer?
templates.content: Seller Funds will be deposited in your Rebag Wallet associated with you Rebag account once we receive and review your item. You can then transfer your funds from your Rebag Wallet to your checking account or receive a check via mail. Once funds are made available in your Wallet, you can also easily use your Seller Funds like cash to purchase something new on Rebag.

templates.name: I signed-up for Rebag+ when buying an item but canceled my order shortly thereafter. Will I still be a Rebag+ member and charged $50?
templates.content: When you cancel your order in My account → purchases, you're only canceling the items you purchased. You have to go to My Account → Wallet → Rebag+ in order to cancel your membership, otherwise you will be charged your $50 contribution five days after you joined.

templates.name: How do I join Rebag+?
templates.content:
You can become a Rebag+ member when making a purchase or by joining Rebag+ here https://www.rebag.com/membership/. When making a purchase, simply select the Rebag+ membership option in cart, and you'll be enrolled in a $50 monthly membership as you checkout for your items. Your benefits start immediately - you'll even benefit from Rebag+ preferred pricing on that order!

If you prefer to join the membership program without making a purchase,  visit https://www.rebag.com/membership/, select the monthly or yearly contribution that is right for you and provide the credit card details for the card you will use for your membership contribution.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at contact@rebag.com or reach us by telephone on +1-844-373-7723. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Do I need to enroll in Premium Payouts?
templates.content: No! After you sell an item to Rebag, your payout, known as Seller Funds, will be deposited into a section of your online account called Wallet. You will automatically earn your first Premium Payout on the first day of the following month. With Premium Payouts, your Seller Funds will continue to increase by 2% for up to 12 months, generating up to 27% in bonus payouts.

templates.name: What does Final Sale mean for Outlet items?
templates.content: All Outlet items are Final Sale, which means that Rebag's return policy does not apply to Outlet items. Once purchased on Rebag, Outlet items cannot returned or exchanged - the purchase of an outlet item is final. Outlet items are also not eligible for Rebag Infinity buyback.

templates.name: What payment methods do you accept?
templates.content: Rebag accepts all major credit and debit cards. Only one credit card may be used per purchase. We also accept payment through PayPal, Affirm, Google Pay, and Rebag Credit. (Please note PayPal & Affirm checkout is only available through the website).

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: Shipping is free for Rebag+ members and $20 in all other cases. To become a member please follow this link: https://www.rebag.com/joinmembership/

templates.name: Is there a deductible?
templates.content: There are no deductibles.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.rebag.com/store/

templates.name: Can I change my monthly contribution amount?
templates.content: Yes, you can upgrade to a higher amount or downgrade to a lower amount at any time. When you do this, the amount you selected and confirmed will be charged going forward, starting on your next scheduled contribution charge.

templates.name: Why do some listing titles say "Outlet"?
templates.content: Some items will be listed with "(Outlet)" on the listing title to specify that its an off-price item. This should not be confused with the "Outlet Collection" where items that are final sale are listed under.

templates.name: Do Rebag+ credits ever expire?
templates.content: No! There is no expiry date on your R+ Credits, being your contribution or the bonus awarded on top. You can keep accumulating R+ Credits and store them to use them in the future at your leisure.

templates.name: The item I want is already sold, can I bookmark it?
templates.content: All our items are one of a kind and sell quickly. If you find a product you like but is already sold, you can set up an email notification to alert you when it is back in stock. On the sold product listing, click on "Set Back in Stock Alert,".  This product will be added to your favorites and you will receive an email the next time a similar item becomes available. To stop existing alerts, remove the item from your favorites list.

templates.name: I want to change the card used for my monthly contribution, can I update it?
templates.content: Yes, simply go to My Account → Wallet → Rebag+ → Manage Membership, and select Update Payment Method. When you update your payment method, you will not be charged at that time.  Your membership contribution timing will not change, and your new card will be charged on your next scheduled contribution date.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/rebagofficial/ link and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/rebagofficial/

templates.name: Do I have to spend my seller funds at Rebag?
templates.content: No, while you will receive a 10% Spending Bonus any time you put your Seller Funds towards a Rebag purchase, you can transfer your Funds anytime via bank transfer or check.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at  wholesale@rebag.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Do I need an appointment to submit in-store?
templates.content: No appointment is necessary! Simply walk in and an agent will be able to assist you.

templates.name: How often do you get new items?
templates.content: Hundreds of new handbags and accessories are released on Rebag.com each week. Visit us on Wednesdays and shop our New Arrivals here https://shop.rebag.com/collections/new-arrivals before they're gone.

templates.name: When will the 2% monthly bonus be added to my total R+ Credit?
templates.content: Your 2% monthly bonus will be awarded on the first day of every month for all of your eligible contributions. Remember that each of your contributions are eligible for the 2% monthly bonus for up to 12 months after they are charged.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes one business day and we usually ship via FedEx and USPS. Once shipped it will take 6-9 for domestic orders. We also offer expedited shipping options.
